metadata.name: exira
metadata.description: Exira: savings-backed efficiency financing on Solana

accounts.name: treasury_usdc_ata
docs: Treasury USDC ATA receiving the origination fee.

accounts.name: auditor_wallet
docs: The auditor's wallet that will be authorized.

accounts.name: investor_usdc_ata
docs: Investor's USDC ATA (source of USDC payment)

accounts.name: investor_token_ata
docs: Investor's project token ATA (destination of minted tokens)

accounts.name: investor_usdc_ata
docs: Investor's USDC ATA (destination of claimed USDC). Created if needed.

accounts.name: mrv_project
docs: Reference MRV project. Must already have baseline submitted.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Project's fractional ownership SPL token. Mint authority = project PDA.

accounts.name: usdc_vault
docs: USDC ATA owned by the project PDA (vault).

accounts.name: admin_usdc_ata
docs: Source of funds for the pool distribution (admin's USDC ATA).

accounts.name: admin_usdc_ata
docs: Admin's USDC ATA sourcing the repayment funds.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin who signs and pays. Becomes the platform authority.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The official USDC mint we accept (Circle devnet/mainnet).

accounts.name: destination
docs: Any USDC ATA; must match platform.usdc_mint. Owner is free-form.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized signer for this instruction

errors.name: PlatformAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Platform already initialized

errors.name: InvalidUsdcMint
errors.msg: Invalid USDC mint

errors.name: InvalidFeeBps
errors.msg: Fee basis points exceeds 10_000 (100%)

errors.name: InvalidTargetAmount
errors.msg: Target amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidTermMonths
errors.msg: Term months out of allowed range

errors.name: MrvBaselineMissing
errors.msg: Referenced MRV project does not exist or has no baseline submitted

errors.name: DuplicateId
errors.msg: Project or pool ID already in use

errors.name: PoolFull
errors.msg: Pool is full; target amount reached

errors.name: NotFunding
errors.msg: Pool is not in Funding status

errors.name: NotActiveOrRepaying
errors.msg: Pool is not in Active or Repaying status

errors.name: NotCompleted
errors.msg: Pool is not Completed

errors.name: CannotWithdraw
errors.msg: Cannot withdraw after activation

errors.name: NotFullyFunded
errors.msg: Pool has not reached target amount

errors.name: CannotCancelActive
errors.msg: Cannot cancel after activation

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: Nothing to claim

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Zero amount not allowed

errors.name: NoTokensSold
errors.msg: No tokens sold yet; cannot distribute

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow in distribution math

errors.name: MathUnderflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic underflow in distribution math

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Claim amount exceeds vault balance (invariant violation)

errors.name: AuditorInactive
errors.msg: Auditor is not authorized or inactive

errors.name: BaselineAlreadySubmitted
errors.msg: Baseline already submitted for this project

errors.name: InvalidVerificationPeriod
errors.msg: Verification period is invalid (end before start)

errors.name: AlreadyAttested
errors.msg: Verification already attested

errors.name: AttestationAuditorMismatch
errors.msg: Only the submitting auditor can attest their own verification

errors.name: PoolTooManyProjects
errors.msg: Pool has reached max underlying projects (V1 limit)

errors.name: ProjectAlreadyLinked
errors.msg: Project already linked to this pool

errors.name: ProjectNotLinked
errors.msg: Project is not linked to this pool

errors.name: WrongVault
errors.msg: Wrong vault account provided

errors.name: WrongMint
errors.msg: Wrong token mint provided

errors.name: WrongPlatform
errors.msg: Wrong platform config

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: String field exceeds maximum length

types.name: Auditor
docs: Registered auditor (BEE-certified etc). PDA seeds: ["auditor", wallet.key()]

types.name: Baseline
docs: Baseline (pre-retrofit) energy consumption for an MRV project.
PDA seeds: ["baseline", mrv_project.key()]

fields.name: energy_kwh_per_year
docs: Pre-retrofit annual energy consumption (kWh)

fields.name: cost_inr_per_year
docs: Annual energy cost in paise (INR * 100) for precision

fields.name: co2_tons_per_year_x100
docs: Baseline CO2 emissions per year in tons, scaled x100

fields.name: report_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of the off-chain detailed baseline report

types.name: InvestorPosition
docs: One investor's position in either a Project or a Pool (target_kind distinguishes).
PDA seeds: ["position", target.key(), owner.key()]

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that owns this position

fields.name: target
docs: Either Project PDA or Pool PDA key

fields.name: tokens_held
docs: How many project/pool tokens this position represents

fields.name: last_claimed_per_token
docs: Dividend accumulator value at the time of the investor's last claim (or at buy-in)

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Total USDC claimed across all claim events (accounting only)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this position PDA

types.name: MrvProject
docs: MRV (Measurement, Reporting, Verification) project registry entry.
PDA seeds: ["mrv_project", project_id.to_le_bytes()]

types.name: Platform
docs: Singleton platform config. PDA seeds: ["platform"]

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin authority (controls all admin instructions)

fields.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet that receives origination + performance fees

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: Accepted USDC mint (Circle devnet/mainnet official mint)

fields.name: origination_fee_bps
docs: Origination fee charged at activate_project, in basis points (150 = 1.5%)

fields.name: performance_fee_bps
docs: Performance fee on upside above hurdle, in basis points (3000 = 30%)

fields.name: hurdle_rate_bps
docs: Hurdle rate — investors must earn this before carry kicks in, in basis points

fields.name: project_count
docs: Monotonic counter for project_id assignment

fields.name: pool_count
docs: Monotonic counter for pool_id assignment

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for the platform PDA

types.name: Pool
docs: Index/pool aggregating multiple projects. PDA seeds: ["pool", pool_id.to_le_bytes()]

fields.name: pool_token_mint
docs: SPL mint for this pool's fractional (diversified) ownership tokens

fields.name: usdc_vault
docs: USDC ATA owned by this pool's PDA (receives payouts flowing up from projects)

fields.name: target_amount
docs: Max USDC raise target for pool tokens

fields.name: tokens_sold
docs: Pool tokens sold so far

fields.name: total_distributed
docs: Total USDC distributed to pool token holders (lifetime)

fields.name: cumulative_usdc_per_token
docs: Pull-based dividend accumulator at pool layer

fields.name: underlying_project_count
docs: How many underlying projects this pool has linked

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle status

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp at creation

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this pool PDA

types.name: PoolProjectLink
docs: Link between a pool and an underlying project.
PDA seeds: ["pool_link", pool.key(), project.key()]

fields.name: project_tokens_held
docs: How many project tokens this pool holds for this linked project

types.name: Project
docs: MSME project being financed. PDA seeds: ["project", project_id.to_le_bytes()]

fields.name: mrv_project
docs: Link to the MrvProject account that carries baseline + verifications

fields.name: token_mint
docs: SPL mint for this project's fractional ownership tokens

fields.name: usdc_vault
docs: USDC ATA owned by this project's PDA

fields.name: target_amount
docs: Max USDC this project wants to raise (in smallest units). Also = max tokens to mint.

fields.name: tokens_sold
docs: How much USDC has been raised (tokens sold count) so far

fields.name: total_distributed
docs: Total USDC distributed as repayments (lifetime)

fields.name: cumulative_usdc_per_token
docs: Pull-based dividend accumulator, scaled by PRECISION (1e12)

fields.name: term_months
docs: Repayment term in months

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle status

fields.name: activated_at
docs: Unix timestamp at activation (0 if not yet active)

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp at creation

fields.name: origination_fee_collected
docs: Total origination fee collected at activation (1.5% of target)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this project PDA

types.name: Verification
docs: Post-retrofit measurement + verification for a period.
PDA seeds: ["verification", mrv_project.key(), verification_index_le]

fields.name: energy_kwh_saved
docs: Actual energy savings (kWh) measured in the period

fields.name: cost_inr_saved
docs: Actual cost savings (paise) in the period

fields.name: co2_tons_avoided_x100
docs: CO2 avoided (tons, scaled x100)

fields.name: savings_vs_expected_bps
docs: Actual savings vs expected, in basis points (10000 = 100%)

fields.name: attested
docs: True once the submitting auditor has signed-off / attested
